channel.title: Web-Performance on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Web-Performance on Pi Stack

item.title: Sitespeed.io vs WebPageTest vs Lighthouse: Self-Hosted Web Performance Monitoring 2026
item.description: Web performance directly impacts user engagement, conversion rates, and search engine rankings. While hosted services like GTmetrix and Pingdom offer convenient testing, self-hosting your performance monitoring stack gives you unlimited tests, complete data ownership, and the ability to test internal or staging environments that aren’t publicly accessible.
